solutions.label: Solutions
solutions.title: Three solutions. Zero noise.
solutions.sub: We don't do everything. We do three things really well. Every project includes strategy, design and development. No freelancers, no subcontracts.
solutions.s1_desc: Shopify optimized for drops, conversion and brand experience. Custom checkout, launch system, premium product pages.
solutions.s2_desc: Editorial sites for luxury, fashion and hospitality brands. Premium visual design, animations, multilanguage.
solutions.s3_desc: Landings designed to sell from day one. Launches, pre-sales, lead generation. CRO applied to every section.

cta_strip.title: Does your brand deserve a website like this?

process.label: Our process
process.title: From idea to launch. No complications.
process.sub: 4 clear steps. You always know exactly what stage your project is at.
process.s1_desc: We analyze your business, competition and goals before designing a single screen.
process.s2_desc: We prototype and validate every screen. Your approval before we write code.
process.s3_desc: Clean code, optimal speed and full compatibility. Every detail reviewed.
process.s4_desc: We go live with analytics configured and support you afterward.

pricing.label: Investment
pricing.title: Clear pricing. No surprises.
pricing.sub: We know budget matters. Fair prices for international-quality work. No hidden fees.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.title: Everything you need to know before getting started.
faq.q1: How long does it take to build my website?
faq.a1: Landing page in 7–10 business days. Brand Website in 14–21 days. Full Shopify can take 3–5 weeks. Always with clear dates from the start.
faq.q2: Are the prices shown the final price?
faq.a2: They are base prices. The final price depends on the specific scope of the project. No surprise charges: everything is defined in a proposal before we start.
faq.q3: Do you work with clients in Panama and abroad?
faq.a3: Yes, 100% remote. We have delivered projects in Panama, Mexico, Colombia and the United States. We work in Spanish and English.
faq.q4: Can I edit my website after launch?
faq.a4: Yes. Business and Pro projects include an admin panel to update content without touching code. We also offer monthly maintenance plans.
faq.q5: What if I don't like the design?
faq.a5: We present prototypes and wait for your approval before developing. Revision rounds included. We don't move forward without your sign-off.

cta_end.title: Your business deserves a digital presence that sells.
cta_end.sub: Don't let your competition beat you online. Every day without a strategic website is a customer going elsewhere.

about.label: Who we are
about.title: An agency obsessed with your growth.
about.sub: At Rupta Studios we don't build websites. We build business tools. Every project starts with one question: how does this grow our client?
about.v1_desc: Everything has a clear, measurable goal. We design to convert, not to impress.
about.v2_desc: Deadlines met, direct communication and no-excuse quality. No indefinite delays.
about.v3_desc: We are not one-project vendors. We are the permanent digital team for our clients.
